top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, MAX(l.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish' AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) < '1982'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    d.dob, 
    MAX(lt.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
    AND d.dob < '1982-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY 
    latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, MAX(l.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish' AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) < '1982'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    d.dob, 
    MAX(lt.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
    AND d.dob < '1982-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY 
    latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    d.dob, 
    MAX(lt.milliseconds) AS latest_lap_time_ms
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
    AND d.dob < '1982-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY 
    latest_lap_time_ms DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, MAX(l.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish' AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) < '1982'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
  AND CAST(substr(d.dob, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) < 1982
ORDER BY (
    SELECT MAX(lt.time)
    FROM lapTimes lt
    WHERE lt.driverId = d.driverId
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    d.dob, 
    MAX(lt.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
    AND d.dob < '1982-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY 
    latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, MAX(l.time) AS latest_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish' AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) < '1982'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
ORDER BY latest_lap_time DESC
LIMIT 10;
